The '''Mandalorian dungeon ship''' was a wartime transport used by various [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] organizations.

==History==
The Mandalorian dungeon ships were used by the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]].

The class was used as a basis for the [[Lictor-class dungeon ship|''Lictor''-class dungeon ship]] thousands of years after the conflict ended. The [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] used these aging vessels during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Appearances==
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 8|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 8]] {{1st}}
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 23|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 23]]
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 24|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 24]]
